tasks.subject: Verify fix #1: --expand <query> no longer parses query as numeric arg
tasks.description: Test: `tilth --expand handleRequest --scope src` should work (not fail with "invalid digit"). Also test `--expand=5 handleRequest`, `--expand handleRequest`, and bare `--expand` with query after.

tasks.subject: Verify fix #2: Multi-word concepts with --expand produce expanded output
tasks.description: Test: `tilth "error handling" --expand --scope src` should produce expanded inline source, not raw format. Compare output with and without --expand.

tasks.subject: Verify fix #3: --map conflicts with --expand, --section, --full
tasks.description: Test: `tilth --map --expand 5 --scope src` should be rejected by clap. Also test `--map --callers`, `--map --deps`, `--map --section 1-5`.

tasks.subject: Verify fix #4: Related file hints gated on !full or comment updated
tasks.description: Test: Read a large file with `--full` and check if related hints are still appended. Read without --full and verify hints appear on outline. Check the comment text.

tasks.subject: Verify fix #5: --expand with file path doesn't allocate unused Session/SymbolIndex
tasks.description: Read src/lib.rs and verify use_expanded excludes FilePath/Glob query types so no unnecessary allocation happens.
